name: Profile_R5_QuestionnaireResponse_R4
title: Cross-version Profile for R5.QuestionnaireResponse resource for use in FHIR R4
description: This cross-version profile allows R5 QuestionnaireResponse resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 QuestionnaireResponse resources.

element.short: Cross-version Profile for R5.QuestionnaireResponse resource for use in FHIR R4
element.definition: This cross-version profile allows R5 QuestionnaireResponse resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 QuestionnaireResponse resources.

constraint.requirements: Cardinality constraints for identifier from R5 for use in FHIR R4

element.short: R5: Business identifier for this set of answers
element.comment:
Element `QuestionnaireResponse.identifier` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `QuestionnaireResponse.identifier` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `QuestionnaireResponse.identifier` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
Note: This is a business identifier, not a resource identifier (see [discussion](https://hl7.org/fhir/resource.htm#identifiers)).

element.short: R5: The individual or device that answered the questions
element.comment:
Element `QuestionnaireResponse.source` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `QuestionnaireResponse.source` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The standard extension `alternate-reference` has been mapped as the representation of FHIR R5 element `QuestionnaireResponse.source` with unmapped reference targets: Device, Organization.
If not specified, no inference can be made about who provided the data. Device should only be used if it directly determined the answers, not if it was merely used as a capture tool to record answers provided by others. In the latter case, information about the physical device, software, etc. would be captured using Provenance.
